title: Tests: git wire roundtrip with OR-Set + notes

acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] New model file exists (e.g., beads_stateright_models/examples/wal_crash_recovery_machine.rs) and compiles
- [ ] Properties cover no origin_seq reuse, receipt honesty, and recovery catch-up (todo.md Model #8)
- [ ] Model doc comments reference REALTIME_PLAN.md §6.5 and §0.11
- [ ] Example runs via cargo run --example wal_crash_recovery_machine (or equivalent)
description:
**Problem**
Crash consistency and origin_seq uniqueness must hold across the append/fsync/index/apply/receipt pipeline (REALTIME_PLAN.md §6.5). There is no model that explores crash cut points and recovery behavior.

**Design Notes**
This is an abstract model of ordering, not a full WAL implementation.
design:
**Design**
Create a Stateright model that encodes the durability ordering from Plan §6.5: allocate seq, write record, fsync, index commit, apply, receipt finalize, reply. Allow a crash at each cut point and a recovery step that replays durable records and reconciles PENDING receipts (Plan §0.11).

Properties: no origin_seq reuse after recovery, LocalFsync receipts imply event survives crash, and recovery finds durable-but-unindexed events (todo.md Model #8).

Keep the state small (counters + flags) but align the cut points to the plan language.
title: Stateright: WAL crash recovery cut points

description:
**Problem**
The current performance/isolation epic is converging, but the work surfaced additional test-infrastructure defects that should not be buried inside closeout notes. These are real follow-on hardening tasks around fixture API shape, cleanup provenance, canonical migration fixtures, and autostart observability.

**Design**
Track the post-closeout test-harness work in one dedicated epic so the current epic can close honestly once its acceptance is met, while the remaining infra improvements stay visible and independently executable.

**Acceptance**
- [ ] Residual test-harness issues discovered during `beads-rs-fblt` are tracked as child beads
- [ ] Each child bead is scoped to one self-contained infrastructure improvement
- [ ] The epic clearly covers post-closeout test reliability and ergonomics work, not current acceptance gaps
title: Test harness determinism follow-through
